request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that while we're paying our fair share for NATO, some allies are falling short? 🇺🇸💸 Studies show that only 8 out of 30 members meet the 2% GDP defense spending target. It's time to demand accountability - our national security shouldn't be a one-way street. #NATO #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
